topic: Could AI design a billion-dollar perfume brand by 2030?

story_angles: Explain why some perfumes fade quickly while others linger all day with visible evidence and science.
Compare molecules, concentration, base notes, fixatives, projection, and skin chemistry because volatility drives longevity.
